developer-tools.name: Ontwikkelaarstools

cloud-hosting.name: Cloud & Hosting
cloud-hosting.description: Europese cloudproviders, VPS-platformen, managed hosting, objectopslag en infrastructuurdiensten.

security-auth.name: Beveiliging & Auth
security-auth.description: Europese identiteits-, authenticatie-, secrets-, wachtwoord-, VPN- en hardwarebeveiligingstools.

analytics-monitoring.name: Analytics & Monitoring
analytics-monitoring.description: Privacy-analytics, observability, metrics, dashboards, alerting en productiemonitoringtools uit Europa.

hardware-iot.name: Hardware & IoT
hardware-iot.description: Europese hardware, IoT-software, open hardware, smart-home-platformen, boards, keys en maker-tooling.

databases-storage.name: Databases & Opslag
databases-storage.description: Europese zoek-, vectordatabases, samenwerkingsopslag, objectopslag en data-infrastructuur.
categoryUseCases: sla bestanden op onder Europese controle

communication-email.name: Communicatie & E-mail
communication-email.description: Europese e-mail, messaging, teamcommunicatie, transactionele mail en notificatietools.

ai-ml.name: AI & ML
ai-ml.description: Europese AI-API's, modelproviders, vector search, ML-infrastructuur, vertaling en AI-toepassingstooling.

payments-billing.name: Betalingen & Facturatie
payments-billing.description: Europese betalingsverwerkers, facturatieplatformen, facturatietools, SEPA, iDEAL en PSD2-klare diensten.

n8n.name: n8n
n8n.description: Workflow-automatiseringsplatform voor het verbinden van API's, SaaS-tools, interne systemen en AI-workflows met self-hosting ondersteuning.

Godot Engine.name: Godot Engine
Godot Engine.description: Gratis en open-source 2D- en 3D-game-engine met brede platformondersteuning.

Home Assistant.name: Home Assistant
Home Assistant.description: Open-source thuisautomatiseringsplatform gericht op lokale controle en privacy.

Elasticsearch.name: Elasticsearch

Grafana.name: Grafana
